description: Declare @davidorex/pi-project-workflows in pi-context-cli dependencies at the lockstep version range so pi-context --pi-bound's require.resolve('@davidorex/pi-project-workflows/package.json') resolves from an installed CLI, not only via the in-repo workspace symlink.
acceptance_criteria: [subagent] pi-context-cli declares @davidorex/pi-project-workflows at the lockstep version range in dependencies.
[orchestrator] require.resolve('@davidorex/pi-project-workflows/package.json') resolves under npm link from a cwd outside the repo.
[orchestrator] build + check + full test suite pass; lockstep version ranges across CLI -> pi-context -> meta remain internally consistent.
[orchestrator] registry-install resolution of the meta-package verified — deferred, release-gated.
